title: Luffy Protects His Crew
description: Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji. Luffy enters the final Davy Back Fight bout against Foxy, whose slow-slow powers and cheating make the match stranger than a normal fight.

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: Take him down in one second!!

dialogue.speaker: Foxy
dialogue.text: The captain of the small but...

dialogue.text: known as the straw hat kiddo...
